steps.title: Use counts as minimums
steps.content: The passage says many films and records from the era are lost, so credited output counts for the four figures should be treated as bare minimums rather than totals.

steps.title: Pick an example exceeding counts
steps.content: Choice A only compares two credited totals. Choice B misstates the table's timing for Carewe. Choice D says Young Deer actually acted in only 10 films, which lowers a credited count instead of treating it as a minimum. The useful example says actual totals could exceed credited counts. The answer is C.
